hub.title: Reports & Statistics Center
hub.subtitle: Browse and extract performance and HR reports
hub.emptyMessage: No report types found that you are authorized to access.

headcount.name: Workforce Headcount
headcount.description: Shows total active employees distributed by department.

leave-summary.name: Leave Summary
leave-summary.description: Leave records (approved, rejected, pending) per employee for a specific period.

overtime.name: Overtime Report
overtime.description: Total overtime hours recorded by employees in attendance logs.

asset-custody.name: Asset Custody Report
asset-custody.description: Assets currently assigned to employees, categorized by employee or asset class.

task-completion.name: Task Completion Report
task-completion.description: Task completion rate analysis per project or assigned employee.

errors.dateRange: End date must be greater than or equal to start date

history.title: Exported Reports History
